_description: Customer-owned detector packs. Add bounded regex detectors here for local member, account, loan, or internal record identifiers. The engine rejects built-in ID overrides and unsafe regex shapes.
_creditUnionPack: Starter core-banking identifier detectors for U.S. credit unions. Every detector ships DISABLED ("enabled": false) and context-gated. Enable ONLY the core your institution runs and tune the pattern to your real account-number format before relying on it. These are warn-tier (severity 2) evidence pointers, not certified detection: most core IDs carry no checksum, so pair them with roster-seeded Exact Data Match (npm run edm:fingerprint) for high-confidence hard blocks.
